headline: Is Sempra Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While Sempra has outperformed the SPX over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Sempra, Raises Price Target to $107
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains Sempra (NYSE:SRE) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $105 to $107.
